surface.why_relevant: Remote execution and product/plugin flows continue to accumulate here, making it a first-class operational surface rather than thin transport glue.
analysis_implications: Inspect app-server before attributing behavior to the TUI.
Treat shell/thread/plugin surfaces as core operational interfaces.
recent_signals: Startup status notifications continue to become more stateful.
Thread and shell command behavior remains a key surface.

commit_subjects: Add thread/shellCommand to app server API surface (#14988)
Feat: reuse persisted model and reasoning effort on thread resume (#14888)
feat: add memory citation to agent message (#14821)
Use workspace requirements for guardian prompt override (#14727)
